_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of successful capabilities to identify the solutions to less common and more complex system problems.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI capability landscape, including current capabilities and limitations of generative AI, predictive AI, and autonomous systems as applied to enterprise business problems.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-029 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.524), TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.513).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.537). Shared vocabulary: [capabilities, knowledge, problems]. DCWF-only terms [common, complex, identify, less, more, solutions] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, applied, autonomous, business, capability, current] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.880, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 24-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Knowledge of successful capabilities to identify the solutions to less common an" and "Knowledge of AI capability landscape, including current capabilities and limitat" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.551 ≈ STS 0.537 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [capabilities, knowledge, problems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.7%. Shared tokens: [capabilities, knowledge, problems]. DCWF-only: [common, complex, identify, less, more, solutions]. WIDAI-only: [ai, applied, autonomous, business, capability, current].

signals.detail: STS 0.537 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
